sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2350" key="ai)qrobole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰθρο-βολέω</orth>, Astrol., <sense id="n2350.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀκτινοβολέω</ref> </xr> (q.v.), c. acc., ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2583.tlg001:224" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">224</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
